description: Assemble a technical manual for the 'Hydra-X Hydraulic Power Unit' by creating a LibreOffice Master Document. The final document must link the source chapters located in '/home/ga/Documents/Hydra_Manual/' in the specific order: '01_safety.odt', '02_operation.odt', and '03_maintenance.odt'. Include a Table of Contents at the start of the manual. Save the completed master document as '/home/ga/Documents/Hydra_Manual/hydra_manual_master.odm'.
